ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the blockchain project */,
  "blockchain" TEXT /* Blockchain network used by the project */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_website" TEXT /* URL to the project's official website */,
  "project_whitepaper" TEXT /* URL to the project's whitepaper */,
  "project_logo" TEXT /* URL to the project's logo */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "liquidity_pools" (
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each liquidity pool */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project that the pool belongs to */,
  "pool_address" TEXT /* Address of the liquidity pool on the blockchain */,
  "pool_name" TEXT /* Name of the liquidity pool */,
  "pool_description" TEXT /* Description of the liquidity pool */,
  "pool_status" TEXT /* Current status of the pool (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "total_liquidity" REAL /* Total liquidity in the pool */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pool was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pool was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_liquidity_pools_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the liquidity pool where the token is used */,
  "token_address" TEXT /* Address of the token on the blockchain */,
  "token_type" TEXT /* Type of token (e.g., underlying_token_bought) */,
  "token_name" TEXT /* Name of the token */,
  "token_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the token */,
  "token_decimals" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places for the token */,
  "token_supply" REAL /* Total supply of the token */,
  "token_status" TEXT /* Current status of the token (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tokens_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES liquidity_pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the token involved in the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the token involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell, transfer) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., successful, pending, failed) */,
  "from_address" TEXT /* Address from which the transaction originated */,
  "to_address" TEXT /* Address to which the transaction was sent */,
  "fee" REAL /* Transaction fee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_transactions" (
  "user_transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-transaction association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user conducting the transaction */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction executed by the user */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the user transaction (e.g., successful, pending, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_transactions_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project for which analytics is recorded */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the token for which analytics is recorded */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the token */,
  "trading_volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the token */,
  "user_views" INTEGER /* Number of views by users */,
  "unique_visitors" INTEGER /* Number of unique visitors */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the token */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the token */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project being versioned */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the project */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
